title: cordia myxa var. domestica
intro: Cordia myxa var. domestica, also known as the Wild Plum or Carissa, is a deciduous shrub native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cordia myxa var. domestica include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve using its leaves and fruits to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
